author: imitation-alpha
name: Ternary QAT vs Int5 Proxy Study (1xRTX2060)
blurb: Non-record 16MB submission documenting a FineWeb-based proxy study of BitNet-style ternary QAT. Full ternary underperformed, but mixed ternary scaled to 11L d=640 reached 3.2609 post-quant val_bpb at 13.61MB total and repeated at 3.2611 on a second seed, effectively matching a proxy int5 baseline while using fewer bytes.
